sub.line1: More than a tasting — it is an invitation to

project.p1: In the heart of the driest desert on Earth, an experience is born that invites you to discover
project.p2: From a sensory, cultural and deeply authentic perspective.
project.title: Our project proposes a unique journey.
project.p3: exploring the geographic and cultural diversity of the country through a curated selection of wines that represent its different valleys, climates and traditions.

sommelier.info3: from the old and new world

jobs.alt: Camilo Chávez holding a bottle of wine

tiers.description: 1 white wine, 1 soft red wine and 1 full-bodied red wine.
2 white wines and 3 reds of different intensity.
1 sparkling wine, 2 white wines, 4 red wines of different intensity.

footer.note1: All tastings include bread, olives, olive oil and mantecoso cheese.
footer.note2: * Includes visual presentation of valleys, terroir and producer winery.
footer.note3: * All feature at least 3 different Chilean valleys.

partners.intro: At En Una Copa we work with strategic alliances that allow us to offer authentic, high-quality experiences. Discover our three pillars of collaboration.

dots: Commission per sale / fee per guest
Possibility of exclusive events for the hotel/hostel
Integration in combined experiences (gastronomy, wellness, etc.)

collab.p1: We invite agencies, hotels and tourism ecosystem actors to be part of this experience, incorporating a unique proposal that allows their clients to discover Chile from an innovative, sensory and memorable perspective.
collab.p2: It not only complements the existing offer, but enriches the travel experience, creating a deeper bond between the visitor and the territory. We are available to coordinate meetings, sample tastings or develop custom proposals according to your needs.

contact.name: Camilo Chávez
contact.title: Let's Talk and Uncork
contact.desc: Let's schedule a 30-minute meeting to discuss the feasibility of working on a project together.
